summary: Exported buildBrainstormBrief from bin/lib/brainstorm-cmd.mjs and derived its fenced markdown example from PRD_SECTIONS so the brief cannot drift from validateSpecFile. Added test/brainstorm-cmd.test.mjs with direct assertions that both the bullet list and the fenced example advertise every PRD_SECTIONS heading, and wired it into the npm test script. npm test: 591 pass / 0 fail.
